about.title: About
about.founder_bio: With 15+ years of experience in technology infrastructure and software development, including enterprise partnerships with Intel, NVIDIA, and MSI, Uptake Agency brings deep technical expertise to every engagement.

footer.about: Uptake Agency is a technology consulting firm based in Istanbul, Turkey, specializing in AI integration, custom software development, automation, and cloud infrastructure. Founded by Cengiz Selcuk with 15+ years of experience and enterprise partnerships with Intel, NVIDIA, and MSI.
footer.services_keywords: AI Consulting • Custom LLM Solutions • RAG Systems • Full-Stack Development • TypeScript • React • Next.js • WhatsApp Business API • Workflow Automation • Docker • Kubernetes • CI/CD • Cloud Infrastructure
